ledger.ownershipBasis: Authored for Beastbound Odyssey by deterministic project-owned synthesis. No recordings, samples, third-party melodies, or reference-game audio are used.
ledger.processing: Direct deterministic synthesis, zero-DC centering, and 20 ms edge-energy loop conditioning to little-endian PCM16 WAV; no downloaded samples, silence fade, or external encoder
ledger.replacementPath: Replace after owner listening with commissioned/original reviewed masters; preserve semantic cue IDs and re-run bundle plus decoded-loop audits.

musicRuntimeFormatDecision: First-pass music is deterministic PCM16 stereo WAV. The generator is the lossless source; later production replacement should encode reviewed seamless masters to Ogg Vorbis and re-run decoded-stream auditing.
